mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_sms_code(phone, scene, code_hash, expires_at, attempt_count) VALUES(#{phone}, #{scene}, #{codeHash}, #{expiresAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_sms_code SET attempt_count = attempt_count + 1 WHERE phone = #{phone} AND scene = #{scene} AND used_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
